title: columnea scabrida
intro: Columnea scabrida, also known as the scrubby columnea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to Central America, particularly in Costa Rica and Panama. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Columnea scabrida include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies.
